channel.title: Ics on Joseph Carlson
channel.description: Recent content in Ics on Joseph Carlson

item.title: Stuxnet
item.description:
Stuxnet - a wake up call for ICS Security

Why This Matters

Critical Infrastructure

What Happened?

Timeline Characteristics Attribution

Why This Happened

Reliability > Security

Lack of encryption in ICS protocols like Modbus

Perfect Security < Human Curiosity

More on Our Critical Infrastructure

The Power Grid

Case Studie: Ukraine 2015 & 2016 - malware shuts down substations

What else can go wrong? One EMP. No malware needed.

Pipelines

Case Study: Colonial Pipeline - ransomware
